name: Robert Bolt
abstract: Robert Oxton Bolt (15 August 1924 – 20 February 1995) was an English playwright and a screenwriter, known for writing the screenplays for Lawrence of Arabia, Doctor Zhivago, and A Man for All Seasons, the latter two of which won him the Academy Award for Best Adapted Screenplay. He also was the recipient of a Tony Award, two BAFTA Awards…

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Hendricks
about_quotes.evidence: I’m also trying to get a transcript of the screenplay to “Lawrence of Arabia” by Robert Bolt. Best screenwriting in the history of film.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Hendricks interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 2 of 2]
